headline: Is EOG Resources (EOG) Still Attractively Priced After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether EOG Resources is still attractively priced at around US$133.60, this article explains what the current share price might imply about its underlying value. The stock has returned 1.7% over the past week, 10.7% over the last 30 days, 24.5% year to date, 11.8% over 1 year, 44.4% over 3 years and 143.4% over 5 years. This gives useful context before you weigh up what the current valuation might mean for you. Recent attention on EOG Resources has centered on its role...

headline: Is EOG Resources (EOG) One of the Most Undervalued Energy Stocks to Buy Now?
summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) is one of the most undervalued energy stocks to buy now. EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) received a rating update from Barclays on March 13. headline: How Encino-Boosted Output And Tension-Lifted Gas Prices At EOG Resources (EOG) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: EOG Resources recently reported past fourth-quarter results that topped profit forecasts as production rose to 1.40 million barrels of oil equivalent per day, helped by its US$5.60 billion Encino Acquisition Partners deal and lifted by stronger natural gas prices amid heightened Middle East tensions. This combination of acquisition-fueled volume growth, geopolitical-supported pricing, and improving free cash flow expectations has sharpened investor focus on how resilient EOG’s operating...
